name: crypto-fear-greed
description: Crypto Fear & Greed Index time series via Arrays (Circle nanopayment, DIRECT). Single direct-rail GET over a time window; no router hop.

start_time.description: Window start as a Unix timestamp in seconds (UTC). For current sentiment, use roughly now minus 2 days.

end_time.description: Window end as a Unix timestamp in seconds (UTC). Must be greater than start_time; use the current time for the latest reading.

steps.label: fear & greed index — Arrays (Circle nanopayment / Gateway-batched, DIRECT)
